args.query: SELECT p.Name, p.Version, p.UpstreamPublishedAt FROM packageinfo p JOIN (SELECT Name, MAX(UpstreamPublishedAt) AS max_ts FROM packageinfo WHERE System='NPM' GROUP BY Name) m ON p.Name = m.Name AND p.UpstreamPublishedAt = m.max_ts WHERE p.System='NPM';

exec_args.sql: SELECT p.Name, p.Version, p.UpstreamPublishedAt FROM packageinfo p JOIN (SELECT Name, MAX(UpstreamPublishedAt) AS max_ts FROM packageinfo WHERE System='NPM' GROUP BY Name) m ON p.Name = m.Name AND p.UpstreamPublishedAt = m.max_ts WHERE p.System='NPM';
